name: Bug Report

labels: bug
assignees: ''

## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap / click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What you expected to happen. -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or console output. -->

## Screenshots

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem. -->

## Environment

| Field          | Value                                 |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| Platform       | iOS / Android / Web / Desktop         |
| App / Area     | Mobile / Admin / Landing / API        |
| App Version    | e.g. 1.2.3                            |
| OS Version     | e.g. iOS 17.4 / Android 14 / macOS 14 |
| Browser        | e.g. Chrome 124 (if web)              |
| Node / Runtime | e.g. Node 20.11 (if backend)          |

## Severity

<!-- Choose one and delete the rest -->

- [ ] Critical — app crash, data loss, security issue
- [ ] High — major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] Medium — feature partially broken, workaround exists
- [ ] Low — cosmetic / minor inconvenience

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context about the problem here. -->
